phone.label: Lambarka telefoonka
phone.searchCountry: Raadi dalka, koodhka, ama horudhaca taleefanka
phone.noCountries: Ma jiraan dal la mid ah raadintaada.
phone.tooShort: Lambarkan telefoonka aad buu u gaaban yahay.
phone.tooLong: Lambarkan telefoonka waa mid aad u dheer.
phone.invalid: Geli lambarka telefoonka ee saxda ah ee dalka la doortay.
phone.valid: Lambarka taleefanka caalamiga ah ee saxda ah

auth.onboardingTagline: Saaxiib badbaado shakhsi ah xilliyada u dhexeeya "Waan fiicanahay" iyo "Waxaan u baahanahay caawimaad."
auth.createSubtitle: Dooro habka gelitaanka si aad u ilaaliso jaantuskaaga badbaadada.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Ma dhammaystiri karin isdiiwaangelinta. Hubi xiriirkaaga oo mar kale isku day.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Iyadoo la adeegsanayo kal-fadhiga horumarinta maxalliga ah. Native Google Sign-In waxay ka shaqeysaa dhisme horumarineed.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Isku xidh hadda ama sii wad oo ku dar markale.
auth.northStarBody: Qalabka VL01 ee la xidho wuxuu kici karaa socodka badbaadada iyadoo la adeegsanayo taabasho iyo dhaqdhaqaaqyo riixid dheer.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Saaxiibkaaga badbaadada ee khariidada iyo wicitaanada.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear ka caawin kartaa habka guriga, habka ilaaliyaha, habka degdegga ah, wicitaannada cudurdaarsiyo, iyo taageerada codka.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Waxaa loo isticmaalay khariidada, meelaha khatarta, imaanshaha badbaadada ah, iyo macnaha SOS.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving weydiiyaa goobta si ilaaliyadu u fahmaan meesha caawimaad loo baahan karo. Waxaad beddeli kartaa tan dambe Settings-ka.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Ogeysiisyadu waxay taageeraan hubinta iyo dhacdooyinka degdegga ah.
permissions.notificationsBody: Waxaan isticmaalnaa oo kaliya ogeysiisyada amniga, cusbooneysiinta degdegga ah, iyo xusuusinta aad awoodiso.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Goobtu waxay ilaalisaa macnaha badbaadada si sax ah
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving wuxuu isticmaalaa goobtaada si uu u helo khariidada badbaadada, aagagga khatarta, wadaagga degdega ah, iyo macnaha SOS. Waxaad beddeli kartaa tan dambe Settings-ka.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: Digniinaha badbaadada waxay u baahan yihiin ogeysiisyo
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving waxay dirtaa xusuusin hubin, cusbooneysiin degdeg ah, iyo tilmaamo badbaado oo aad awoodiso. Ma isticmaalno ogeysiisyada xayaysiisyada.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Makarafoonku wuxuu awood siiya wicitaannada badbaadada
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving isticmaalaa makarafoonkaaga kaliya markaad bilowdo wicitaan AI saaxiib ama badbaado.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving wuxuu isticmaalaa Bluetooth si uu ula xiriiro dahabka NorthStar, uu akhriyo xaaladda xiriirka, iyo inuu kiciyo socodka badbaadada ee qalabka la xiro.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving ka dhigtaa socodkan mid laga heli karo Settings iyo dashboard-ka.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Dooro codka saaxiibka ah ee ugu ammaan badan in la maqlo.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Kormeer aamusnaan ah oo badbaado maalinle ah.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: La wadaag macnaha dadka lagu kalsoon yahay.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Shan taabasho ayaa kor u kici kara digniinaha SOS iyo ilaaliyaha.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Abuur sabab qurux badan oo aad uga baxdo xaalad aan raaxo lahayn.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Bilow wicitaan saaxiib waqtiga-dhabta ah markaad u baahan tahay taageero.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Isku day socodka badbaadada ee demo cadaadis hoose leh.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Dahabka ag dhow ku hay inta aad baarayso.
jewelry.noDevices: Qalab NorthStar oo dhow lama helin weli.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth baadhistu ma bilaaban karin. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
jewelry.scanFailed: Ma aanan helin dahabka agagaarka. Hubi Bluetooth, NorthStar dhow, mar kale isku day.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth baadhistu ma bilaaban karin. Hubi Bluetooth gelitaanka oo mar kale isku day.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Gelitaanka qalabka agagaarka waa la damiyay. U ogolaa Bluetooth gelitaanka Settings, ka dibna isku day mar kale.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar aad u dheerayd inaan isku xiro. U dhaqaaji meel u dhow oo mar kale isku day.
jewelry.connectFailed: Ma aanan la xiriiri karin NorthStar. Hubi in uu ku dallaco oo ag dhow yahay, markaas mar kale isku day.
jewelry.emptyMessage: NorthStar ku hay dallac oo ku dhow telefoonkan, ka dibna mar kale baar.

home.subtitle: Dashboard-ka saaxiibka badbaadada
home.readyBody: Codka, khariidada, dahabka, iyo ilaaliyayaal hal taabasho ayaa u jirta.

map.title: Khariidadda badbaadada
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go hordhac; Mapbox lagu soo bandhigo dhisme horumarineed.
map.updateFailed: Ma cusboonaysiin karno goobtaada. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
map.notRequested: Helitaanka goobta lama codsan. Waxaad ka hawlgelin kartaa goor dambe Settings.
map.permissionOff: Helitaanka goobta waa la damiyay. Hawlgeli Settings si khariidada badbaadada kuu dhexdhexaadiso.
map.timeout: Goobtaada ayaa qaadanaysa waqti ka badan sidii la filayay. U dhaqaaq meel calaamad cad oo mar kale isku day.
map.savedEmptyTitle: Meelo la badbaadiyay weli ma jiraan
map.savedEmptyMessage: Meelaha lagu kalsoon yahay ee aad kaydsato ayaa halkan ka soo muuqan doonta si degdeg ah loo helo.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.ready: Diyaar u ah in la isku xiro
safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Si ammaan ah ugu xirma saaxiibkaaga codka...
safetyCall.typePlaceholder: Nooca haddii hadalka uu adag yahay
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Bilow wicitaanka ama fariin qor markaad diyaar tahay.

chat.retryAccessibility: Isku day mar kale fariin dirista

history.clearMessage: Tani waxay ka saartaa fariimaha la keydiyay AI saaxiib ee qalabkan.
history.title: Taariikhda Wadahadalka
history.subtitle: AI farriimo la socda oo lagu kaydiyay qalabkan.
history.emptyMessage: Wadahadalladaada AI ee saaxiibada ayaa halkan ka soo muuqan doona kadib wicitaankaaga ugu horreeya.
history.loadFailed: Ma aanan soo gelin karin taariikhda wada hadalka. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
history.clearFailed: Taariikhda wada hadalka ma nadiifin karno. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
history.deleteFailed: Ma tirtiri karno wadahadalkaas. Fadlan mar kale isku day.

voices.title: Codadka wicitaanka badbaadada
voices.subtitle: Dooro codka saaxiibka ah ee saxda ah in la maqlo.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Fadlan mar kale isku day inaad codka doorato.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Muunaddan codka lama ciyaari karin. Fadlan mar kale isku day.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Isticmaal jawaabaha la socda marka aqoonsiga shabakadda ama Hume aan la heli karin.
settings.privacyBody: Dhoofi ama tirtir xogta maxalliga ah ee lagu kaydiyay qalabkan.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Ma awoodo in xogtaada la dhoofiyo hadda.
settings.deleteConfirmTitle: Dhammaan xogta maxalliga ah ma tirtiri karaa?
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Tani waxay ka saartaa profile-kaaga, dejimahaaga, xiriirada degdegga ah, taariikhda wada hadalka, xusuusinta ogolaanshaha, iyo kalfadhiga aqoonsiga maxalliga ah ee qalabkan.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Ma awoodo in la tirtiro xogta maxalliga ah hadda.

sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, ilaaliyeyaasha, iyo xiriirada degdegga ah

settings.updateFailedMessage: Ma badbaadin karno doorashadaas. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Fadhigaagu weli waa mid firfircoon. Fadlan mar kale isku day.

contacts.title: Xiriirada degdegga ah
contacts.subtitle: Dad lagu kalsoon yahay oo diyaar u ah inta lagu jiro socodka badbaadada.
contacts.name: Magaca
contacts.empty: Xiriirro degdeg ah lama kordhin weli.
contacts.emptyTitle: Weli xiriir degdeg ah lama hayo
contacts.emptyMessage: Ku dar qof aad ku kalsoon tahay si uu diyaar u noqdo marka badbaado u baahan yahay.
contacts.removeMessage: Qofkan mar dambe kuma soo muuqan doono socodkaaga degdegga ah.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Xiriirkan ma badbaadin karno. Faahfaahinta hubi oo mar kale isku day.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Xiriirkan ma ka saari karno. Fadlan mar kale isku day.

friends.title: Saaxiibo
friends.subtitle: Ilaaliyayaal, codsiyada, iyo jaantuska degdegga ah.
friends.emptyMessage: Asxaabta lagu kalsoon yahay iyo ilaaliyayaal ayaa halkan ka soo muuqan doona marka la daray.

emergency.title: Degdeg SOS
emergency.subtitle: Kordhi kaliya marka aad u baahan tahay taageero degdeg ah.
emergency.body: Tani waxay ogeysiin doontaa socodkaaga badbaadada waxayna diyaarin doontaa xiriirada degdegga ah.
emergency.addContact: Ku dar xiriir degdeg ah Settings-ka.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Qaybta wadaagga goobta waa diyaar. Ku xir dhamaadka share-ka backend-ka si aad u dirto xiriirro toos ah.

capybearTap.title: Capybear
capybearTap.subtitle: Laba jeer taabo NorthStar si aad u tuurto liin badbaado ah.
capybearTap.body: Jidka Gesture-ka waa diyaar si loogu sameeyo fiilooyinka dhacdooyinka BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: Waxaad u muuqataa mid offline ah. Fariintaada waa la diri doonaa markaad dib isugu xirto.
errors.voiceQueued: Fariinta waa la badbaadiyay. Waxaa la diri doonaa marka codka saaxiibka uu dib isugu xiro.
errors.voiceRetrying: Mar kale isku dayaya inaad fariintaada dirto...
errors.voiceConnecting: Si ammaan ah ugu xirma saaxiibkaaga codka...
errors.microphone: Helitaanka makarafoonka ayaa loo baahan yahay wicitaannada codka. Waxaad furi kartaa Settings, ama fariin qor halkii.
errors.billing: Barnaamijka codka ee internetka si ku-meel-gaar ah looma heli karo. Waxaad sii wadi kartaa saaxiibka offline-ka.
errors.authentication: Saaxiibka codka ma xaqiijin karin fadhigan. Mar kale gal ama hadda isticmaal saaxiibka offline-ka.
errors.timeout: Saaxiibka codka ayaa aad u dheereeyay inuu ka jawaabo. Hubi xiriirkaaga oo mar kale isku day.
errors.network: Ma gaari karin codka saaxiibka. Hubi xiriirkaaga, kadibna isku day mar kale ama sii wad offline.
errors.genericVoice: Waxbaa carqaladeeyay wicitaanka codka. Mar kale isku day, ama sii wad saaxiibka offline-ka.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving u baahan yahay marin makarafoon si ammaan ah iyo wicitaannada saaxiibka AI.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving isticmaalaa goobtaada khariidadda badbaadada iyo astaamaha badbaadada ee agagaarka.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving isticmaalaa Bluetooth si ay ugu xirmaan dahabkaaga badbaadada NorthStar.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Habkan gelitaanka lagama heli karo noocan.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Ku sii wad habka tijaabada (horumarinta oo keliya)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Habka tijaabadu wuxuu isticmaalaa oo keliya xog been-abuur ah oo gudaha ah. Adeegyada ku xiran lama xaqiijin, fadhiganna dib ayuu u bilaabmaa marka abka dib loo raro.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Koodhka xaqiijintu waa khaldan yahay ama wuu dhacay. Codso koodh cusub oo mar kale isku day.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Isku-dayo gelitaan oo aad u badan. Wax yar sug, dabadeed mar kale isku day.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Xaqiijinta gelitaanku waqti dheer ayay qaadatay. Hubi isku-xirkaaga oo mar kale isku day.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Ma aannu gaari karin adeegga gelitaanka. Hubi isku-xirkaaga oo mar kale isku day.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Fadhigaagu wuu dhacay. Mar kale gal.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Khariidadda badbaadada lama soo rari karin. Hubi isku-xirkaaga oo mar kale isku day.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Goobta tooska ah lama heli karo. Waxaa la muujinayaa goobtaadii ugu dambaysay ee la kaydiyey %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Ma aannu wadaagi karin goobtaada. Hubi oggolaanshaha goobta oo mar kale isku day.
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Waa tan goobtaydii ugu dambaysay ee la kaydiyey, lana diiwaangeliyey %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Gelitaanka Bluetooth waa dansan yahay. Ka daar Dejimaha, dabadeed mar kale isku day.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth waa dansan yahay. Daar, dabadeed mar kale isku day.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Isku-xidhka Bluetooth lagama heli karo qalabkan ama noocan.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Ma aannu heli karin NorthStar. Ku hay meel dhow, hubi Bluetooth, oo mar kale isku day.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Wax qalab NorthStar ah oo dhow lama helin. Ku hay meel dhow oo mar kale raadi.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Ma aannu ku xirmi karin NorthStar. Hubi inuu dallacan yahay oo kuu dhow yahay, dabadeed mar kale isku day.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Ma aannu kaydin karin goobtan. Mar kale isku day.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Lambargeliyaha taleefanka waa furmay; wicitaanka lama xaqiijin.
releaseCritical.sosCancelled: Waa la joojiyey; wax wicitaan ah lama samayn.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Xiriir degdeg ah lama helin; wax wicitaan ah lama samayn.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Lambargeliyaha taleefanka lama furi karin; wax wicitaan ah lama samayn.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Isku-daygii SOS ee ugu dambeeyey lama xaqiijin karin.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Wehelka codka hadda lama heli karo. Mar kale isku day goor dambe ama ku sii wad wehelka aan internetka u baahnayn.
releaseCritical.editContactTitle: Wax ka beddel xiriirka degdegga ah
releaseCritical.contactUpdated: Xiriirka degdegga ah waa la cusboonaysiiyey.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
